name: Ubiquiti Ethernet Surge Protection 24-Port
title: Ubiquiti Ethernet Surge Protection 24-Port
description: The Ubiquiti UACC-ETH-SP-Panel-24 is a robust 24-port Ethernet surge protector designed for indoor rack installations. Supporting data rates up to 10 Gbps and PoE++, it ensures reliable protection for your critical network infrastructure. Each port delivers 20kA discharge capacity with rapid response to surges (from 100 V/s to 1 kV/µs), safeguarding devices from ESD and EMP events. The 1U rack-mount form factor integrates seamlessly into standard network racks, making it ideal for enterprise networks, data centers, and industrial environments. Built with durable SGCC steel, the panel withstands harsh operating conditions ranging from -40° to +80°C. With minimal signal loss (capacitance only 1.0 pF at 1 MHz), it maintains high-speed connectivity while ensuring full PoE support. Whether protecting switches, routers, or access points, this panel provides professional-grade protection in a compact and efficient design.

detailed_description.heading: Comprehensive Protection
detailed_description.text: The Ubiquiti UACC-ETH-SP-Panel-24 is a robust 24-port Ethernet surge protector designed for indoor rack installations. Supporting data rates up to 10 Gbps and PoE++, it ensures reliable protection for your critical network infrastructure. Each port delivers 20kA discharge capacity with rapid response to surges (from 100 V/s to 1 kV/µs), safeguarding devices from ESD and EMP events. The 1U rack-mount form factor integrates seamlessly into standard network racks, making it ideal for enterprise networks, data centers, and industrial environments. Built with durable SGCC steel, the panel withstands harsh operating conditions ranging from -40° to +80°C. With minimal signal loss (capacitance only 1.0 pF at 1 MHz), it maintains high-speed connectivity while ensuring full PoE support. Whether protecting switches, routers, or access points, this panel provides professional-grade protection in a compact and efficient design.

detailed_description.heading: High Performance and Easy Integration
detailed_description.text: Featuring 24 integrated surge-protected ports, the UACC-ETH-SP-Panel-24 offers full bidirectional protection for Ethernet lines. Its 48 RJ45 connectors allow straightforward inline installation without disrupting existing network configurations. With a DC spark-over voltage of 90V at 100 V/s and maximum impulse voltage of 600V at 1 kV/µs, it efficiently absorbs transient currents and prevents damage. The panel’s robust insulation (1G ohm at 50V) and compact 1U height ensure a perfect fit even in high-density server environments. Designed for simplicity and performance, it helps maintain uninterrupted high-speed operation for all connected devices. A must-have solution for network administrators looking to secure mission-critical infrastructure against damaging power surges.
